There is another Ketu nam^ d Calaketu, which appears in the
western direction, and is possessed of a crest, raised a digit high,
with its tip turned towards the south. As it moves towards north its
length increases. It touches the Seven Sages i.e. towards the Great
Bear, as well the Pole Star and the star Abhijit, and turn,s back after
travelling only half the length of the sky and then sets in the south.
When this comet makes its appearance, people in the area lying
between the banks of the Prayaga (near Allahabad) and the town of
Avanti as well as the forest of Puskara will be destroyed. In the
northern region too people .will come to grief as far as the Devika
